'''竏喇-ch-b-h''' ('''kahachbehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jillick|jillick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jillick|jillick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-ch-b-h
|-
! Lemma
| kahachbehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihachbehoko|thihachbehoko]] || [[word:jihachbehoko|jihachbehoko]] || [[word:shihachbehoko|shihachbehoko]] || [[word:kihachbehoko|kihachbehoko]]
